name: Pasta with Grilled Poultry Sausages (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 4 tomatoes, seeded and cut into 1/2-inch dice
7 ounces pimientos, finely sliced – or roasted red peppers
1/2 teaspoon saffron threads dissolved in 2 tablespoons sherry wine vinegar
1 pound spicy chicken sausages or turkey sausages
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
2 scallions, green parts only, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta in 2 quarts of salted water until al dente.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the tomatoes, peppers, olive oil, and saffron vinegar.
3. Grill the sausages on a lightly oiled stovetop grill for about 6 or 7 minutes per side. Slice them thinly.
4. Add the sliced sausages to the tomato and pepper mixture.
5. Drain the cooked pasta and toss it with the sausages, tomatoes, peppers, and seasoning.
6. Garnish with scallions.
Yield: 4 servings
